description: A logistics hub needs an asynchronous order processing pipeline. Set up Oracle Advanced Queuing (AQ) in the HR schema (password: hr123) after granting EXECUTE on DBMS_AQ and DBMS_AQADM from SYSTEM (password: OraclePassword123). Define an object type 'ORDER_EVENT_T' with attributes ORDER_ID (NUMBER), CUSTOMER_CODE (VARCHAR2(20)), REGION (VARCHAR2(20)), and PRIORITY (NUMBER). Establish a queue table 'ORDER_EVT_QT' and a started queue 'ORDER_EVT_Q'. Implement a procedure 'ENQUEUE_ORDER' to populate the queue and use it to enqueue five specific orders: (1001, AMZN_PRIME, NA_EAST, 1), (1002, WALMART_US, NA_WEST, 2), (1003, TARGET_HQ, NA_MID, 3), (1004, DHL_EXPRESS, EU_GER, 1), and (1005, FEDEX_INTL, ASIA_JP, 1). Export the ORDER_ID and CUSTOMER_CODE from the 'AQ$ORDER_EVT_QT' view to /home/ga/Desktop/queue_dump.txt.
